meta_description: These plastics imbue injection molded parts with enhanced physical and mechanical properties due to their high melting points.

sections.heading: Tips for Injection Molding With High-Temperature Plastics
sections.text: Tips for Injection Molding With High-Temperature Plastics Published on December 13, 2021 Originally published on fastradius.com on December 13, 2021 A fast and cost-effective process, injection molding is well-suited for high-volume production runs of precise, repeatable parts. Historically, injection molded parts have been made from weaker materials. Recently, however, product teams have begun to explore what’s possible when they use high-performance engineering plastics for injection molding. These plastics imbue parts with enhanced physical and mechanical properties and offer improved thermal properties due to their high melting points. Injection molding with these plastics can be challe...
